title: [HGLDD] Fix instance output port emission
body:
The `EmitHGLDD` translation currently emits instance output ports as XMR `<instName>.<portName>`. This is not valid HGLDD. Remove this special handling of instances. Instead if a value cannot be emitted as HGLDD, try to follow the value's use as input to a wire or assignment and use the destination name instead.

Also fix an issue where ops with a single result and `hw.verilogName` attribute would be emitted as signal references with that Verilog name. This code path would trigger for instances with a single output port, causing the instance name to be used for the signal reference. Limit that code path to only trigger on Comb dialect ops.

Fixes #6735.
